Activity

Maximilian Wiese posted this
1 week ago

Gemini Enterprise is a game changer for document-heavy workflows.
Last week we went live with a client where Gemini processes 3,000+ invoices per day – fully automated.
The accuracy rate after fine-tuning: 97.3%. That's production-ready.

Key lessons learned:
1. Ground your prompts with real examples from the client's own data
2. Build a human-in-the-loop step for edge cases – trust, but verify
3. Monitor token costs closely; Gemini 1.5 Pro is powerful but pricing adds up

Happy to share our architecture template DM me.

#GeminiEnterprise #GoogleCloud #AI #DocumentAutomation #CLOUDPILOTS

87 reactions · 23 comments · 6 reposts

---

Maximilian Wiese posted this
3 weeks ago

Agentic AI is not just an LLM calling tools – it is a fundamentally different architecture.
After building 4 agentic systems in production, here is what I've learned:

- State management is the hardest problem (not the model)
- ReAct loops need hard iteration limits or they go off the rails
- Your eval framework matters more than your model choice
- Start with 2-agent systems before going multi-agent

We just published an internal whitepaper on this. I will share a summary next week.

#AgenticAI #LLM #GoogleCloud #EnterpriseAI #CLOUDPILOTS

112 reactions · 41 comments · 14 reposts
